text:
is the soundtrack album for the anime TV series Neon Genesis Evangelion. It was composed by Shirō Sagisu and published by via its label STARCHILD with catalog number KIJA-6~7 on 09 September 2015 on 2 Vinyls discs (12" 33 1/3 rpm) https://vgmdb.net/album/53438 . The analog cutting was done by Chris Bellman, who has worked on many masterpieces at Bernie Grundman Mastering in Los Angeles. https://web.archive.org/web/20160711002937/http://www.evastore.jp/pc/index.php?toid=PC_ARTICLE&fromid=PC_ARTICLE_LIST&article_id=21644&category_id=5 The cover was illustrated by Takeshi Honda.
